issue.body:
Current error: `module must export a PersonalAIPlugin as default or 'plugin'`. Doesn't say what was exported.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Error message includes `Object.keys(mod).join(', ')`
- If a likely candidate exists (e.g. `default` exported but lacks `name`), mention which required field is missing

Files: `src/plugins/loader.ts`

Difficulty: 🟢 easy
issue.title: Plugin loader: better error when export shape is wrong

pull_requests_reviewed.body:
## What

Added `.github/FUNDING.yml` to configure GitHub Sponsors funding model for the repository, specifying `Nandansai08` as the supported funding account.

## Why

This enables GitHub to display a "Sponsor" button on the repository, making it easier for users to support the project maintainer through GitHub Sponsors.

## Checklist
- [x] No code changes requiring tests
- [x] No TypeScript compilation needed
- [x] No linting required for configuration file
- [x] Configuration file only (no provider SDK imports)
- [x] N/A - Configuration change
- [x] N/A - Configuration change

https://claude.ai/code/session_011r61pfxZXzSAm5WrT2dSfK
pull_requests_reviewed.title: Add GitHub Sponsors funding configuration

pull_requests_reviewed.body:
## Summary
- add docs/INSTALL.md with macOS, Linux, and Windows troubleshooting sections
- cover Gatekeeper/Ollama startup, native dependency build tools, Linux SELinux labels, Windows ARM64, PowerShell policy, and Ollama PATH fixes
- link the troubleshooting page from the README quick start/install section

Fixes #5

## Validation
- npm ci
- npm run lint
- npm run typecheck
- npm test, 215 passed
- npm run build
- git diff --check
